steps.title: Identify the past event sequence
steps.content: The sentence describes a film the critic least enjoyed before a past event (watching The Maltese Falcon). The verb following 'enjoyed' must reflect an action that occurred earlier than another past action.

steps.title: Apply past perfect tense for sequential past actions
steps.content: B uses 'had been' to show the disapproval of Slumdog Millionaire happened before the critic watched The Maltese Falcon. Past perfect (had + past participle) is required to sequence events. A and C violate time order (present perfect/present tense). D misuses past continuous. That matches choice B — B is correct.
